headlines.title: One killed in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
headlines.summary: Iran says the attack on Kuwait was in retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island.

headlines.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
headlines.summary: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.

headlines.title: Eight killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine
headlines.summary: The bus was travelling between Moscow and Simferopol, in Russian-controlled Crimea.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
headlines.summary: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.

headlines.title: Foreign nationals among at least 21 killed in Delhi fire
headlines.summary: Many victims were South Asians who had travelled to India for treatment or to accompany relatives.

headlines.title: Kuwaiti air defences intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks
headlines.summary: State news agency KUNA reported the country's army is responding to threats, without specifying the source.

headlines.title: SpaceX and Anthropic preparing for major public-market launches
headlines.summary: SpaceX and Anthropic are preparing for what may be the biggest public-market launches in U.S. history, with OpenAI rumored to be close behind.

headlines.title: Powerful Iran-backed militias in Iraq say they will start handing in weapons to authorities
headlines.summary: Shia militia groups announce plans to disarm and integrate into state security forces.

headlines.title: Iran fires missiles and US strikes Iran facility after reports of faltering peace talks
headlines.summary: Escalation in the Iran conflict as peace negotiations show signs of breaking down.

headlines.title: Scott Pelley fired from '60 Minutes,' deepening turmoil at CBS News
headlines.summary: Longtime correspondent's departure adds to ongoing changes at the network's flagship news program.

headlines.title: Trump administration is scrapping $1.8B fund meant to compensate president's allies
headlines.summary: Blanche announces end of 'weaponisation' fund that would have paid people the Trump administration decided were unjustly targeted.

headlines.title: US announces new tariffs over forced labour concerns
headlines.summary: New tariffs come after the US Supreme Court struck down many of President Trump's previous duties in February.
